task_description: Fix all TypeScript errors in 6 broken TSX files and shared-ui package (159 errors), fix backend type errors in quantchat/quantmail, then enhance all existing 9 core apps with killer micro-features (messaging reactions, voice messages, smart inbox, video chapters, etc.) and add cross-app integration services.

verification.summary: All 3456 tests pass (686 new including review-fix tests). packages/shared-ui, quantchat backend, quantmail backend all compile with 0 errors. Semantic review critical issues addressed: Prisma stub isolation, ReadReceipts orphan state fix, ChatBubble onDelete prop restored, AnalyticsService mutation asymmetry fixed.
